task_completion.description: Open the input Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'landsat_multispectral.tif' is visible in the application's product explorer, layer manager, or actively opened in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Extract a spatial subset from Scene start (0, 0) to Scene end (200, 200).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A subset dialog or tool is visible with X and Y coordinates set to start at 0 and end at 200 (or width/height of 200/201), OR a new subsetted product is visible in the product tree.
A reprojection dialog is visible with the target CRS set to WGS 84 or EPSG:4326, OR a new reprojected product is visible in the product tree.

task_completion.description: Save the processed product in BEAM-DIMAP format to the specified projects directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the path '/home/ga/snap_projects/landsat_subset_wgs84.dim' with BEAM-DIMAP format selected, OR a file manager/terminal showing this .dim file exists.

task_completion.description: Export the processed product as a GeoTIFF to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the path '/home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_subset_wgs84.tif' with GeoTIFF format selected, OR a file manager/terminal showing this .tif file exists.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical GIS/Remote Sensing application (like ESA SNAP) to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GUI of an application being used for subsetting and reprojection, rather than just terminal commands like 'gdalwarp' or 'gdal_translate'.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass processing by creating empty or dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use commands like 'touch' or a text editor to simply create files named 'landsat_subset_wgs84.dim' or 'landsat_subset_wgs84.tif'.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the raster data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual presence of raster image displays, processing progress bars, or a populated product tree showing bands and metadata, indicating real data manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif' and contains 4 spectral bands. The spatial subset must be exactly from (0,0) to (200,200). The target CRS for reprojection is WGS 84 (EPSG:4326). The final outputs must be saved as BEAM-DIMAP to '/home/ga/snap_projects/landsat_subset_wgs84.dim' and exported as GeoTIFF to '/home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_subset_wgs84.tif'. The final raster dimensions should be under 400x400 pixels.
